summary: Completed testing of 'Refer a Friend' feature including backend API endpoints and frontend UI. All referral endpoints working correctly. Signup page shows referral banner when ?ref= URL parameter is present. Settings page shows complete Refer a Friend section with stats, referral link, and how it works.
seed_data_creation: Created test referred users during backend testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Referral system is fully implemented and working. GET /api/referrals/my-code returns unique referral code per user. GET /api/referrals/stats returns referral statistics including pending/converted counts. GET /api/referrals/validate/{code} is a public endpoint for validating codes on signup page. Registration with referral_code tracks the referral. Frontend shows referral banner on signup page when ?ref= param present, and Settings page has complete Refer a Friend section with link, code, stats, recent referrals, and 'how it works' explanation.

GET_referrals_my_code.details: Returns referral_code (8 alphanumeric chars), referral_link, created_at. Creates code on first call if not exists.

GET_referrals_stats.details: Returns total_referred, pending_referrals, successful_conversions, rewards_earned, and referrals array with name, email (masked), status, timestamps.

GET_referrals_validate_code.details: Public endpoint (no auth). Returns valid=true with referrer_name, discount_percent=50, message for valid codes. Returns valid=false with message for invalid codes. Case-insensitive.

POST_auth_register_with_referral.details: Registration accepts optional referral_code. When provided, tracks referral in referral_tracking collection with status=pending. Invalid codes don't block registration.

signup_page_referral_banner.details: When ?ref=CODE URL param present, page shows referral banner with 'You've been referred!' title, referrer's name, '50% off' discount text, and gift icon styling.

settings_page_refer_a_friend.details: Shows: 1) 'Refer a Friend' heading with '50% OFF' badge, 2) Referral link input with copy button, 3) Referral code display, 4) Stats (Friends Invited, Subscribed, Rewards Earned), 5) Recent Referrals list with names and Pending status, 6) 'How it works' explanation.

auth_endpoint_protection.details: /referrals/my-code and /referrals/stats require authentication (return 401). /referrals/validate/{code} is public (no auth needed).

stripe_integration_note: Stripe coupon REFERRAL50 is created automatically if it doesn't exist when checkout with referral discount is initiated. Both referrer and referee get 50% off (referee on first payment, referrer when referee subscribes).
